title: Novelty Family Game Pass The Parcel Sprout Alternative Christmas Table Game
features: Perfect for playing round the table with all the family
The sprout is a Tissue wrapped ball
Pass the ball around & unwrap each layer to reveal a gift or forfeit (8 Gifts in total)
Gifts include: Puzzles, Nail file set, Bookmark, Notebook, Mini Bowling Set, Suduko, Ring and Battleship Game
Suitable for children 3 years+ due to small parts
description: Product Description Unwrap the Fun with Every Layer of Christmas Cheer! Bring laughter and excitement to your festive celebrations with the YöL Pass the Parcel Christmas Game. Each layer reveals a surprise — from novelty toys and fun forfeits to colourful hats. Perfect for parties, family gatherings, or Christmas Day entertainment for all ages. Santa Unwrap festive fun with the YöL Pass the Parcel Santa Game — surprises, laughter and joy for all the family this Christmas! Brussel Sprout Unwrap festive fun with the YöL Pass the Parcel Sprout Game — surprises, laughter and joy for all the family this Christmas! Snowman Unwrap festive fun with the YöL Pass the Parcel Snowman Game — packed with gifts, forfeits and Christmas laughter! Pudding Gather the family and unwrap festive fun with the YöL Pass the Parcel Christmas Pudding Game — laughter and surprises for all! Rudolph Bring laughter and festive cheer to your celebrations with the YöL Pass the Parcel Rudolph Game. Each layer reveals a surprise gift, hat or forfeit, creating endless fun for family and friends. A joyful alternative to crackers and perfect for Christmas parties or family gatherings. What Will You Choose? Unwrap the Magic! Will it be the cheerful Snowman, jolly Elf, classic Pudding or bright-nosed Rudolph? Each YöL Pass the Parcel game is packed with fun gifts, hats and forfeits — bringing laughter, surprises and festive cheer to every Christmas celebration! Unwrap the Fun, Discover the Surprises! Festive Prizes and Laughter in Every Layer Each YöL Pass the Parcel Game hides exciting surprises — from mini puzzles and toys to fun forfeits and festive hats. Gather family and friends, take turns unwrapping each layer, and enjoy the laughter as you reveal a new prize every time the music stops!
